node.label: UI
node.description: N1: Set Speed (m/s); N2: Brake input; N3: Regen input; B1: Wheel Slip; B2: Emergency Set (push); B3: Emergency Reset (push); B4:

node.label: Activate Engine
node.description: Connect to engine for remote engine activation (optional)

node.label: UI Return
node.description: B1: Emergency Pending; B2: Remote Engine; B3: Emergency Status; N1: Target Speed; N2: Target Brakes;

node.label: Regen / Dynamic brakes
node.description: Connect to a clutch to a gen and wheel rps grid

node.label: Reverser for steam
node.description: The input signal to be processed.

object.script:
scr,i,o,m=screen,input,output,math pgn,pgb,gn,gb,sn,sb=property.getNumber,property.getBool,i.getNumber,i.getBool,o.setNumber,o.setBool abs,min,max,pi=m.abs,m.min,m.max,m.pi
function clamp(a,b,c) -- value, min, max return max(b, min(c, a)) end
function lerp(a,b,t) t = max(0, min(1, t)) return a*(1-t)+b*t end
-- Predictive anti-slip module function predictive_antislip(max_allow_error, wheel_size) return { max_allow_error = max_allow_error, wheel_size = wheel_size, allowed_error = 0, traction_gain = 0, traction_limit_p = 0,
run = function(self, current, rps, slip, o_s) local wheel_speed_error = abs((current / self.wheel_size) - rps) local limit_adjust_p = 0
if slip then limit_adjust_p = 1 / 100 elseif self.allowed_error - wheel_speed_error >= 0.4 - 0.05 * (max(0, 10 - abs(current))) then limit_adjust_p = -1 / 600 end
self.allowed_error = self.max_allow_error-- clamp(self.allowed_error - limit_adjust_p, 2.25, self.max_allow_error) local target_error = self.allowed_error*.95
local lower = self.allowed_error - 0.3
if wheel_speed_error >= self.allowed_error or slip then self.traction_gain = min(self.traction_gain + 0.02, 12) elseif wheel_speed_error <= lower then self.traction_gain = max(self.traction_gain - 0.005, 0) end
local traction_limit = 1-clamp((wheel_speed_error-self.allowed_error)*(self.traction_gain + 3)*8/3,0,1)
local traction_limit_f = traction_limit * 0.005 + self.traction_limit_p * 0.995 self.traction_limit_p = traction_limit_f return traction_limit_f, wheel_speed_error end } end
-- Corrective anti-slip module function corrective_antislip(sensitivity) return { sensitivity = sensitivity, slip_long = 0, grip_duration = 0, traction_limit = 0, last_slip = 0, last_slip_speed = 0, slip_pulse = false,
run = function(self, thr_o, thr_i, cur_speed, slip, reset_pulse) local moving = abs(cur_speed) > 0.5 local close_last_thr = abs(thr_o - self.last_slip) < 0.02 and abs(self.last_slip)>0.05 local close_last_speed = close_last_thr and abs(cur_speed - self.last_slip_speed) < 0.5 local limit_adjust = 0
if slip then self.slip_long = min(self.slip_long + 1, 21) if not self.slip_pulse then self.last_slip = thr_o self.last_slip_speed = cur_speed end self.grip_duration = 0 if close_last_thr then limit_adjust = 1 / (4500 - self.slip_long * 210) else limit_adjust = 1 / 2000 end elseif self.grip_duration > 20 and moving then self.slip_long = 0 if close_last_thr then if not close_last_speed then limit_adjust = -1 / 20000 end else limit_adjust = -1 / 2000 end else self.grip_duration = min(self.grip_duration + 1, 61) end
if reset_pulse then self.traction_limit = 0 end
self.traction_limit = clamp(self.traction_limit - limit_adjust * self.sensitivity, 0.25, min(1, abs(thr_i + 0.1))) self.slip_pulse = slip
return self.traction_limit end } end
wheel_size = pgb("Wheel size") and pi or 3*pi/5 traction_system = pgn("Traction system") thr_manip = pgb("Throttle out")
predictive_as = predictive_antislip(2.85, wheel_size) corrective_as = corrective_antislip(1) brake_corrective_as = corrective_antislip(3) dyn_corrective_as = corrective_antislip(3)
thr_out = 0 brake_out = 0 dyn_out = 0
function onTick() set_speed = gn(1) current_speed = gn(2) thr_in = gn(3) brake_in = gn(4) dyn_in = gn(5) wheel_rps= gn(6)
reverse = gb(3) reset_pulse = gb(4) slip = gb(7) overspeed = gb(8)
--thr abs or -1 to 1 if thr_manip then if reverse then thr = abs(min(thr_in, 0)) else thr = max(thr_in, 0) end else thr = thr_in end
predictive_out, wheel_speed_diff = predictive_as:run(current_speed, wheel_rps, slip, overspeed) corrective_out = corrective_as:run(thr_out, thr, current_speed, slip, reset_pulse) brake_as_out = brake_corrective_as:run(brake_out, 1, abs(current_speed)+1, slip, false) dyn_as_out = dyn_corrective_as:run(dyn_out, min(dyn_in+.5,1), current_speed, slip, false)
if traction_system == 1 then -- corrective / steam style --thr_out = lerp(0,thr,corrective_out) thr_out = clamp(thr, -corrective_out, corrective_out) elseif traction_system == 2 then -- predictive / wheel rps thr_out = lerp(0,thr,predictive_out) elseif traction_system == 3 then -- nothing thr_out = thr * 1 else thr_out = thr * 0 end
brake_out = brake_in * brake_as_out dyn_out = dyn_in * dyn_as_out
sn(1, thr_out) sn(2, brake_out) sn(3, dyn_out) sn(4, predictive_out) sn(5, corrective_out) sn(6, wheel_speed_diff) sn(7, wheel_rps) sb(1, reverse)
end

scr,i,o,m=screen,input,output,math pgn,pgb,gn,gb,sn,sb=property.getNumber,property.getBool,i.getNumber,i.getBool,o.setNumber,o.setBool abs,min,max,pi=m.abs,m.min,m.max,m.pi
min_speed=2/3.6 -- 2 kmh target speed deadzone max_diff_p=3.1 --pgn("Max difference between Wheels and Speed ( default 3.3)") dir_t_dead = 0.05 -- direct thr deadzone dyn_max_coast = 0.8 -- dynamic brakes max on coast mode steam_rev = false sp_pid_max = 1 sp_pid_min = -1 dyn_coast = 0 current_speed_hold = 0 pid_a=pgn("Speed Pid aggressiveness") max_accel=pgn("Acceleration limit (m/s^2)")/10 p_brake=true--pgb("Parking Brake if No Master") cut_thr_brk=pgb("Throttle when Braking") cut_thr_dyn=pgb("Throttle when Dynamic Braking") Thr_Type=pgn("Throttle Type") -- 1 = set speed, 2 = direct (no pid all balls) coast_type=pgn("Coast Style") -- 1=thr no care, 2 = thr limit to dir, 3 = dynamics + 2 abs_thr=pgb("Throttle out")
function clamp(a,b,c) -- value, min, max return max(b, min(c, a)) end
function round1(x) if x >= 0 then return m.floor(x * 10 + 0.5) / 10 else return m.ceil(x * 10 - 0.5) / 10 end end
function PID(Kp, Ki, Kd, alpha) return { Kp = Kp, Ki = Ki, Kd = Kd, alpha = alpha, integral = 0, last_error = 0, filtered_error = 0, run = function(self, sp, pv, reset, Min, Max) local error = sp - pv local Kp_s = self.Kp local Kd_s = self.Kd local Ki_s = self.Ki if reset then self.integral = 0 end self.filtered_error = self.alpha * error + (1 - self.alpha) * self.filtered_error local derivative = self.filtered_error - self.last_error self.last_error = self.filtered_error local p_term = Kp_s * error local d_term = Kd_s * derivative self.integral = clamp(self.integral + error * Ki_s, Min, Max) local output = p_term + self.integral + d_term return clamp(output, Min, Max) end } end
speed_pid = PID(0.01*pid_a, 0.0001*pid_a, 0.005*pid_a,0.9)
function onTick() master = gb(1) master_in_chain = gb(2) opposite = gb(3) -- opposite dir to master tcp_emergency = gb(4) tcp_req_emergency = gb(5) tcp_engine = gb(6)
ui_slip = gb(7) -- un used ?? ui_emergency_set = gb(8) ui_emergency_reset = gb(9) ui_engine = gb(10) ui_pass_emergency_set = gb(11) p_brake_disable = gb(12)
tcp_t = gn(4) -- main bus speed tcp_b = gn(5) -- main bus brake tcp_dyn = 0 -- tcp dynamic brake -- needs assinged ch current_speed = gn(7) ui_t = gn(8) -- ui speed ui_b = gn(9) -- ui brake ui_dyn = gn(10) -- ui dynamic brakes
-- who is controller if master then -- this is master set_speed = ui_t set_brake = ui_b set_dyn = ui_dyn
elseif not master_in_chain then -- no master in chain set_speed = 0 if p_brake and not p_brake_disable then set_brake = 1 set_dyn = 1 else set_brake = 0 set_dyn = 0 end
else -- master in chain if opposite then set_speed = -tcp_t else set_speed = tcp_t end set_brake = tcp_b set_dyn = tcp_dyn end
-- reset pulse for 1 tick r_2 = set_dyn > 0.05 or abs(set_speed)<1 or set_brake > 0.05 reset_pulse = (r_2 and not r_1) or (r_1 and not r_2) r_1 = r_2
-- Target speed and Limits rate of change if Thr_Type == 1 then -- set_speed thr type set_speed_out = set_speed >= 0 and clamp(set_speed, -1, current_speed + max_accel) or clamp(set_speed, current_speed - max_accel, 1)
elseif Thr_Type == 2 then -- direct thr type dir_speed_gain = round1(set_speed)*max_accel*2
set_speed_out = current_speed >= 0 and current_speed + clamp(dir_speed_gain,-5,max_accel) or current_speed + clamp(dir_speed_gain,-max_accel,5) else set_speed_out = 0 end
-- Coast limits overspeed = abs(current_speed) > abs(set_speed_out)+.5 and current_speed * set_speed_out >= -0.01 -- for case of target is +10 and cur = -5
if abs(current_speed) < min_speed*2 or (coast_type==1 and not abs_thr) then -- if near min speed or using thr to slow down sp_pid_max = 1 sp_pid_min = -1 dyn_coast = 0 elseif (coast_type >= 2 and overspeed) or abs_thr then -- no thr used to slow down or thr range is 0 to 1, needs to slow for reverse -- this only engages if overspeed if set_speed_out > 0 then sp_pid_max = 1 sp_pid_min = -0.01 else sp_pid_max = 0.01 sp_pid_min = -1 end
if coast_type == 3 and overspeed then -- same as above but also apply dynamic brakes dyn_coast = clamp(((abs(current_speed)-abs(set_speed))*.2),0,dyn_max_coast) else dyn_coast = 0 end else sp_pid_max = 1 sp_pid_min = -1 dyn_coast = 0 end
-- Throttle to extenders thr_out_on = (cut_thr_brk or set_brake <= 0.02) and (cut_thr_dyn or set_dyn <= 0.02) and abs(set_speed) >= min_speed
if thr_out_on then if Thr_Type == 1 or not master then -- set speed thr_out = speed_pid:run(set_speed_out, current_speed, reset_pulse, sp_pid_min, sp_pid_max) elseif Thr_Type == 2 then -- direct throttle if abs(set_speed) < dir_t_dead then thr_out = 0 else thr_out = set_speed -- set_speed input is now direct thr end end else thr_out = 0 end
-- Emergency fun and giggles that still need to be done but F that req_emergency = ui_emergency_set or ui_pass_emergency_set emergency_stop = false --
-- reverser if abs(current_speed) < min_speed*3 then steam_rev_out = set_speed_out < 0 end
engine_out = tcp_engine or ui_engine brake_out = set_brake dyn_out = set_dyn + dyn_coast
sn(1, set_speed_out) sn(2, current_speed) sn(3, thr_out) sn(4, brake_out) sn(5, dyn_out) sn(6, gn(11)) -- wheel rps remove for 1.4
sb(1, master) sb(2, engine_out) sb(3, steam_rev_out) sb(4, emergency_stop) sb(5, req_emergency) sb(6, reset_pulse) sb(7, gb(13)) -- slip, remove for 1.4 sb(8, overspeed)
end

c60.script:
scr,i,o,m=screen,input,output,math pgn,pgb,gn,gb,sn,sb=property.getNumber,property.getBool,i.getNumber,i.getBool,o.setNumber,o.setBool abs,min,max,pi=m.abs,m.min,m.max,m.pi
function clamp(a,b,c) -- value, min, max return max(b, min(c, a)) end
function lerp(a,b,t) t = max(0, min(1, t)) return a*(1-t)+b*t end
-- Predictive anti-slip module function predictive_antislip(max_allow_error, wheel_size) return { max_allow_error = max_allow_error, wheel_size = wheel_size, allowed_error = 0, traction_gain = 0, traction_limit_p = 0,
run = function(self, current, rps, slip, o_s) local wheel_speed_error = abs((current / self.wheel_size) - rps) local limit_adjust_p = 0
if slip then limit_adjust_p = 1 / 100 elseif self.allowed_error - wheel_speed_error >= 0.4 - 0.05 * (max(0, 10 - abs(current))) then limit_adjust_p = -1 / 600 end
self.allowed_error = self.max_allow_error-- clamp(self.allowed_error - limit_adjust_p, 2.25, self.max_allow_error) local target_error = self.allowed_error*.95
local lower = self.allowed_error - 0.3
if wheel_speed_error >= self.allowed_error or slip then self.traction_gain = min(self.traction_gain + 0.02, 12) elseif wheel_speed_error <= lower then self.traction_gain = max(self.traction_gain - 0.005, 0) end
local traction_limit = 1-clamp((wheel_speed_error-self.allowed_error)*(self.traction_gain + 3)*8/3,0,1)
local traction_limit_f = traction_limit * 0.005 + self.traction_limit_p * 0.995 self.traction_limit_p = traction_limit_f return traction_limit_f, wheel_speed_error end } end
-- Corrective anti-slip module function corrective_antislip(sensitivity) return { sensitivity = sensitivity, slip_long = 0, grip_duration = 0, traction_limit = 0, last_slip = 0, last_slip_speed = 0, slip_pulse = false,
run = function(self, thr_o, thr_i, cur_speed, slip, reset_pulse) local moving = abs(cur_speed) > 0.5 local close_last_thr = abs(thr_o - self.last_slip) < 0.02 and abs(self.last_slip)>0.05 local close_last_speed = close_last_thr and abs(cur_speed - self.last_slip_speed) < 0.5 local limit_adjust = 0
if slip then self.slip_long = min(self.slip_long + 1, 21) if not self.slip_pulse then self.last_slip = thr_o self.last_slip_speed = cur_speed end self.grip_duration = 0 if close_last_thr then limit_adjust = 1 / (4500 - self.slip_long * 210) else limit_adjust = 1 / 2000 end elseif self.grip_duration > 20 and moving then self.slip_long = 0 if close_last_thr then if not close_last_speed then limit_adjust = -1 / 20000 end else limit_adjust = -1 / 2000 end else self.grip_duration = min(self.grip_duration + 1, 61) end
if reset_pulse then self.traction_limit = 0 end
self.traction_limit = clamp(self.traction_limit - limit_adjust * self.sensitivity, 0.25, min(1, abs(thr_i + 0.1))) self.slip_pulse = slip
return self.traction_limit end } end
wheel_size = pgb("Wheel size") and pi or 3*pi/5 traction_system = pgn("Traction system") thr_manip = pgb("Throttle out")
predictive_as = predictive_antislip(2.85, wheel_size) corrective_as = corrective_antislip(1) brake_corrective_as = corrective_antislip(3) dyn_corrective_as = corrective_antislip(3)
thr_out = 0 brake_out = 0 dyn_out = 0
function onTick() set_speed = gn(1) current_speed = gn(2) thr_in = gn(3) brake_in = gn(4) dyn_in = gn(5) wheel_rps= gn(6)
reverse = gb(3) reset_pulse = gb(4) slip = gb(7) overspeed = gb(8)
--thr abs or -1 to 1 if thr_manip then if reverse then thr = abs(min(thr_in, 0)) else thr = max(thr_in, 0) end else thr = thr_in end
predictive_out, wheel_speed_diff = predictive_as:run(current_speed, wheel_rps, slip, overspeed) corrective_out = corrective_as:run(thr_out, thr, current_speed, slip, reset_pulse) brake_as_out = brake_corrective_as:run(brake_out, 1, abs(current_speed)+1, slip, false) dyn_as_out = dyn_corrective_as:run(dyn_out, min(dyn_in+.5,1), current_speed, slip, false)
if traction_system == 1 then -- corrective / steam style --thr_out = lerp(0,thr,corrective_out) thr_out = clamp(thr, -corrective_out, corrective_out) elseif traction_system == 2 then -- predictive / wheel rps thr_out = lerp(0,thr,predictive_out) elseif traction_system == 3 then -- nothing thr_out = thr * 1 else thr_out = thr * 0 end
brake_out = brake_in * brake_as_out dyn_out = dyn_in * dyn_as_out
sn(1, thr_out) sn(2, brake_out) sn(3, dyn_out) sn(4, predictive_out) sn(5, corrective_out) sn(6, wheel_speed_diff) sn(7, wheel_rps) sb(1, reverse)
end

c61.script:
scr,i,o,m=screen,input,output,math pgn,pgb,gn,gb,sn,sb=property.getNumber,property.getBool,i.getNumber,i.getBool,o.setNumber,o.setBool abs,min,max,pi=m.abs,m.min,m.max,m.pi
min_speed=2/3.6 -- 2 kmh target speed deadzone max_diff_p=3.1 --pgn("Max difference between Wheels and Speed ( default 3.3)") dir_t_dead = 0.05 -- direct thr deadzone dyn_max_coast = 0.8 -- dynamic brakes max on coast mode steam_rev = false sp_pid_max = 1 sp_pid_min = -1 dyn_coast = 0 current_speed_hold = 0 pid_a=pgn("Speed Pid aggressiveness") max_accel=pgn("Acceleration limit (m/s^2)")/10 p_brake=true--pgb("Parking Brake if No Master") cut_thr_brk=pgb("Throttle when Braking") cut_thr_dyn=pgb("Throttle when Dynamic Braking") Thr_Type=pgn("Throttle Type") -- 1 = set speed, 2 = direct (no pid all balls) coast_type=pgn("Coast Style") -- 1=thr no care, 2 = thr limit to dir, 3 = dynamics + 2 abs_thr=pgb("Throttle out")
function clamp(a,b,c) -- value, min, max return max(b, min(c, a)) end
function round1(x) if x >= 0 then return m.floor(x * 10 + 0.5) / 10 else return m.ceil(x * 10 - 0.5) / 10 end end
function PID(Kp, Ki, Kd, alpha) return { Kp = Kp, Ki = Ki, Kd = Kd, alpha = alpha, integral = 0, last_error = 0, filtered_error = 0, run = function(self, sp, pv, reset, Min, Max) local error = sp - pv local Kp_s = self.Kp local Kd_s = self.Kd local Ki_s = self.Ki if reset then self.integral = 0 end self.filtered_error = self.alpha * error + (1 - self.alpha) * self.filtered_error local derivative = self.filtered_error - self.last_error self.last_error = self.filtered_error local p_term = Kp_s * error local d_term = Kd_s * derivative self.integral = clamp(self.integral + error * Ki_s, Min, Max) local output = p_term + self.integral + d_term return clamp(output, Min, Max) end } end
speed_pid = PID(0.01*pid_a, 0.0001*pid_a, 0.005*pid_a,0.9)
function onTick() master = gb(1) master_in_chain = gb(2) opposite = gb(3) -- opposite dir to master tcp_emergency = gb(4) tcp_req_emergency = gb(5) tcp_engine = gb(6)
ui_slip = gb(7) -- un used ?? ui_emergency_set = gb(8) ui_emergency_reset = gb(9) ui_engine = gb(10) ui_pass_emergency_set = gb(11) p_brake_disable = gb(12)
tcp_t = gn(4) -- main bus speed tcp_b = gn(5) -- main bus brake tcp_dyn = 0 -- tcp dynamic brake -- needs assinged ch current_speed = gn(7) ui_t = gn(8) -- ui speed ui_b = gn(9) -- ui brake ui_dyn = gn(10) -- ui dynamic brakes
-- who is controller if master then -- this is master set_speed = ui_t set_brake = ui_b set_dyn = ui_dyn
elseif not master_in_chain then -- no master in chain set_speed = 0 if p_brake and not p_brake_disable then set_brake = 1 set_dyn = 1 else set_brake = 0 set_dyn = 0 end
else -- master in chain if opposite then set_speed = -tcp_t else set_speed = tcp_t end set_brake = tcp_b set_dyn = tcp_dyn end
-- reset pulse for 1 tick r_2 = set_dyn > 0.05 or abs(set_speed)<1 or set_brake > 0.05 reset_pulse = (r_2 and not r_1) or (r_1 and not r_2) r_1 = r_2
-- Target speed and Limits rate of change if Thr_Type == 1 then -- set_speed thr type set_speed_out = set_speed >= 0 and clamp(set_speed, -1, current_speed + max_accel) or clamp(set_speed, current_speed - max_accel, 1)
elseif Thr_Type == 2 then -- direct thr type dir_speed_gain = round1(set_speed)*max_accel*2
set_speed_out = current_speed >= 0 and current_speed + clamp(dir_speed_gain,-5,max_accel) or current_speed + clamp(dir_speed_gain,-max_accel,5) else set_speed_out = 0 end
-- Coast limits overspeed = abs(current_speed) > abs(set_speed_out)+.5 and current_speed * set_speed_out >= -0.01 -- for case of target is +10 and cur = -5
if abs(current_speed) < min_speed*2 or (coast_type==1 and not abs_thr) then -- if near min speed or using thr to slow down sp_pid_max = 1 sp_pid_min = -1 dyn_coast = 0 elseif (coast_type >= 2 and overspeed) or abs_thr then -- no thr used to slow down or thr range is 0 to 1, needs to slow for reverse -- this only engages if overspeed if set_speed_out > 0 then sp_pid_max = 1 sp_pid_min = -0.01 else sp_pid_max = 0.01 sp_pid_min = -1 end
if coast_type == 3 and overspeed then -- same as above but also apply dynamic brakes dyn_coast = clamp(((abs(current_speed)-abs(set_speed))*.2),0,dyn_max_coast) else dyn_coast = 0 end else sp_pid_max = 1 sp_pid_min = -1 dyn_coast = 0 end
-- Throttle to extenders thr_out_on = (cut_thr_brk or set_brake <= 0.02) and (cut_thr_dyn or set_dyn <= 0.02) and abs(set_speed) >= min_speed
if thr_out_on then if Thr_Type == 1 or not master then -- set speed thr_out = speed_pid:run(set_speed_out, current_speed, reset_pulse, sp_pid_min, sp_pid_max) elseif Thr_Type == 2 then -- direct throttle if abs(set_speed) < dir_t_dead then thr_out = 0 else thr_out = set_speed -- set_speed input is now direct thr end end else thr_out = 0 end
-- Emergency fun and giggles that still need to be done but F that req_emergency = ui_emergency_set or ui_pass_emergency_set emergency_stop = false --
-- reverser if abs(current_speed) < min_speed*3 then steam_rev_out = set_speed_out < 0 end
engine_out = tcp_engine or ui_engine brake_out = set_brake dyn_out = set_dyn + dyn_coast
sn(1, set_speed_out) sn(2, current_speed) sn(3, thr_out) sn(4, brake_out) sn(5, dyn_out) sn(6, gn(11)) -- wheel rps remove for 1.4
sb(1, master) sb(2, engine_out) sb(3, steam_rev_out) sb(4, emergency_stop) sb(5, req_emergency) sb(6, reset_pulse) sb(7, gb(13)) -- slip, remove for 1.4 sb(8, overspeed)
end
